user.description: How would you like to select Syngeos station?

menu_options.station_geolocation_filter: Find Syngeos station near your location (recommended)
menu_options.station_list_filter: Pick Syngeos station from the list

menu_option_descriptions.station_geolocation_filter: List of Syngeos stations within {nearby_radius} kilometers radius
menu_option_descriptions.station_list_filter: List of Syngeos stations in alphabetical order
menu_option_descriptions.station_id: Provide ID of a Syngeos station

data.search_filter: What type of stations would you like to search for?

station_geolocation.description:
If you don't see your station, it may not be active anymore or it may be a new station. In that case, you can try to enter station ID manually (open integration setup again).
You can go to [Settings -> Areas, labels & zones -> Zones](/config/zone) and adjust your home location.

data_description.syngeos_station: List of {station_number} Syngeos stations within {nearby_radius} kilometers radius sorted from the nearest one.

data.search_filter: What type of stations would you like to search for?

station_list.description: If you don't see your station, it may not be active anymore or it may be a new station. In that case, you can try to enter station ID manually (open integration setup again).

data_description.syngeos_station: List of Syngeos stations in alphabetical order.

data_description.id: Enter Syngeos station ID to configure.

error.invalid_response: Invalid API response from the server
error.no_data_available: No data available for selected station

abort.invalid_response: Invalid API response from the server
abort.no_data_available: No data available for selected station

options.all: Search for all types of stations
options.pm10: Search for stations with PM10 sensor
options.pm2_5: Search for stations with PM2.5 sensor
options.caqi: Search for stations with CAQI index sensor
options.co: Search for stations with carbon monoxide (CO) sensor
options.no2: Search for stations with nitrogen dioxide (NO2) sensor
options.so2: Search for stations with sulfur dioxide (SO2) sensor
options.o3: Search for stations with ozone (O3) sensor
options.c6h6: Search for stations with benzene (C6H6) sensor
options.ch2o: Search for stations with formaldehyde (CH2O) sensor
options.noise: Search for stations with noise level sensor
